testcase.name: TC07 - New Projects display mandatory fields and enquiry form submits successfully
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the MagicBricks Mumbai residential page................passed Given the user navigates directly to New Projects Mumbai page...............passed Then the first 3 new project details should be displayed....................passed When the user clicks on the first new project...............................passed And the user switches to the project detail tab.............................passed And the user clicks Contact Seller..........................................passed And the user fills the enquiry form with name "Test User" email "testuser@gmail.com" and mobile "9123359056".passed And the user clicks Get Contact Details.....................................passed And the user selects the first top match....................................passed Then the contact button text should be displayed............................passed
